urdu transliteration text:
Saraa Jahaan Mein Hussain (as)
Hussain (as)
The whole universe says
Hussain (as) Hussain (as)

Ya Hussain, ya hussain,
ya Hussain, ya hussain

(Urdu)
Sara jahaa(n) mei Hussain Hussain
The whole universe says
“Hussain (as) Hussain (as)”

Har aik aan me hussain hussain
Every age in history has said
“Hussain (as) Hussain (as)”

zaman zaman mei hussain hussain
Generation after generation has said
“Hussain (as) Hussain (as)”

Har ik zabaan mei Hussain Hussain
Every language in the world says
“Hussain (as) Hussain (as)”

Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)

(Urdu)
Har ik zuban me har ik jaga, Har reet me hota hai aza
english translation text: In every language and city in the world, the remembrance of Hussain (as) happens in many ways

urdu transliteration text: Saare zabaa(n) hai alag magar, Hussai(n) hai sab ko mila raha
english translation text: All of us are from different backgrounds and origins but we are united by the name “Hussain (as)”

urdu transliteration text: Kyu(n) dundhe ham iska mayina, Nahi hai kuchh isme sochna
english translation text: Why do people look for a reason for this miracle when the answer is so simple?

urdu transliteration text: Juloos aur nohay aur aza, Duae Zahra ki hai sila
english translation text: The things that bring us together (the aza of Hussain (as)) are the result of Lady Zahra’s (SA) supplication

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)

(Arabic)
Anta fil bahrin-najaat, nooruka sirrun lil hayaat
english translation text: You are the sea of salvation and the source of all life is your light

urdu transliteration text: Nahtifu bismika lil mamaat, thaaruka laa nansa hayhaat
english translation text: We will proclaim your name until our deaths and we will never forget your revolution

urdu transliteration text: Zainabu nadaat fil falaat, ayna kafeeli fish-shiddaat
english translation text: We will never forget when Zainab (sa) cried out from Till-e-Zainabiya “Who will be my protector in hardship?”

urdu transliteration text: Saaqeena min adhbil-furaat, waylun waylun lit-tughaat
english translation text: The waves of Al-Furat wash over our thirst quencher, woe upon you oh tyrants!

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
Raaham bede biam Agha, Too Haramet ye baar dige
english translation text: Oh Master please allow me to visit your shrine again

urdu transliteration text: Az Hame Jaa roonde manam, Ooni ke Jaa Moonde Manam
english translation text: .. I am the one who has been expelled from everywhere. I am the one who is all alone..

urdu transliteration text: Ooni ke baal o paresho, Eshghe to Soozoonde manam
english translation text: …I am like a bird whose feathers and wings have been burnt in your love.

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)

english translation text: By giving your head but not your hand, You showed us all how to make a stand
Against oppression and evil plans, You are the guidance to all of man
This promise was made when times began, Throughout the whole world your name will span
In every race and in every clan, Hussain will live on in every land

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)

(Gujrati)
Hussain nu matam ne joyilyo, Chod so varas nu che mojizo
english translation text: Let the world look at the remembrance of Hussain (as) because it is a 1400 year old miracle

urdu transliteration text: Jyarsudhi jivta amme hasso, Tammone pursa deta reso
english translation text: For as long as we are alive we shall continue to remember you

urdu transliteration text: Jaba(n) nu mohtaj aza nathi, Hussain nu naam che atyaar sudhi
english translation text: The aza of Hussain (as) is not limited by language. Hussain’s (as) name has lived on until today

urdu transliteration text: Tamara jevi barabari, Duniya ma koyi aywu nathi
english translation text: No person in the history of the world can have this claim

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)

(Katchii)
Paanke bulayo karbobala, achine ziyarat kare ada
english translation text: Please call us to Karbala so that we can perform your Ziyarah

urdu transliteration text: paanke naseeb thye ainjo mazaar, huda achine kare aza
english translation text: May we all have the ability to see your shrine one day so that we may come and pay your our respects

urdu transliteration text: hi matam ayn Zahra ji dua, inthi mileto panke khuda
english translation text: This remembrance of Hussain (as) is the prayer of Fatema (sa), it takes us closer to Allah (swt)

urdu transliteration text: hi matam ayn panji dil ji shifa, hi matam ayn panji ruh ji  giza
english translation text: It is the cure for the ailments of the heart, and is the sustenance for our souls

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)

(Swahili)
Hussain Hussain wa na sema watu, Wote wa na liya killa siku
english translation text: People throughout the world say “Hussain (as) Hussain (as)” and cry in your name every day

urdu transliteration text: Ume fandisha ulimwengu, Katika moyoni ya watu
english translation text: You have left this message in the hearts of people throughout the world

urdu transliteration text:
killa siku iko Ashura, Killa ardhi iko karbobala
Every day is Ashura and every land is Karbala
Wewe ume okowa islam, Wewe huta sahaaw lika
english translation text: You are the saviour of Islam and for that you will never be forgotten

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)

(Arabic)
Sirruka min allahi saar, awsal islaam al-mukhtaar
english translation text: Even Allah (swt) endorses your remembrance oh Saviour of Islam

urdu transliteration text: Hussainun minni ya ahraar, man aadhaahu bi qa’rin-naar
english translation text: The Prophet (pbuh) himself has said: “Hussain (as) is from me oh people and whoever hurts him will be thrown in hell”

urdu transliteration text: Al-mahdi yadh’haru biftikhaar, yahmilu sayfan dhul-fiqaar
english translation text: Al-Mahdi (as) will return with pride holding the Dhulfiqar

urdu transliteration text: Ya yubqi minal ashraar, yarfa’u raayaatil-karraar
english translation text: He will fight holding the flag of Islam and all the oppressors will cease to exist

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)

(Urdu)
Ye faisla hai ke karbobala, Hai inqelaab ka ye mayina
english translation text: Without a doubt Karbala is the embodiment of the word “revolution”

urdu transliteration text: Har aik momin ki hai baqa, Har aik zalim ki hai qaza
english translation text: It serves as the existence and hope of the pure hearted, and serves as the means for destruction of all evil

urdu transliteration text: “Tejani” zinda rahe aza, Sara jahaa(n) me ho ye sada
english translation text: “Tejani” may this aza live on forever. May the whole universe call out..

urdu transliteration text: Har aik zaban ki ho bus buka, Labbayk labbayk Hussain maula mera
english translation text:
In every dialect of every language:
“Labbayk Labbayk Hussain (as) our master!”

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
Hussain (as), Hussain (as), Hussain (as)
